title: perotis ornithocephala
intro: Perotis ornithocephala, also known as the bird's head or bird's beak flower, is a plant species that belongs to the family Acanthaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating wounds. Herbal preparations of Perotis ornithocephala include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
